requirements.subject: applicant
conditions: project includes demolition work requiring PP&D review

evidence.quote: Submit a completed demolition permit application for demolition permit review.

requirements.formalization_notes: Fixture-only extraction for demolition permit application package validation.

requirements.subject: applicant
conditions: demolition permit submittal package is prepared

evidence.quote: Provide plans or site information that identify the structure and demolition work proposed.

requirements.formalization_notes: Fixture-only extraction for demolition permit application package validation.

requirements.subject: applicant
requirements.object: asbestos survey or required asbestos documentation
conditions: regulated demolition work may disturb building materials

evidence.quote: Demolition projects may need asbestos documentation before permit issuance or work begins.

requirements.formalization_notes: Fixture-only extraction for demolition permit application package validation.

requirements.subject: applicant
conditions: utilities serve the structure proposed for demolition

evidence.quote: Utility services must be addressed before demolition activity proceeds.

requirements.formalization_notes: Fixture-only extraction for demolition permit application package validation.

requirements.subject: applicant
requirements.object: sewer cap or sewer decommissioning requirement
conditions: demolition affects a structure with sewer service

evidence.quote: Sewer service may need to be capped or otherwise resolved as part of demolition work.

requirements.formalization_notes: Fixture-only extraction for demolition permit application package validation.

requirements.subject: applicant
conditions: demolition scope may affect regulated trees

evidence.quote: Tree requirements may apply when demolition work affects trees on or near the site.

requirements.formalization_notes: Fixture-only extraction for demolition permit application package validation.

requirements.subject: applicant
requirements.object: erosion control measures for demolition site
conditions: demolition work disturbs soil or exposes the site to runoff

evidence.quote: Erosion control requirements may apply to demolition projects with ground disturbance.

requirements.formalization_notes: Fixture-only extraction for demolition permit application package validation.

conditions: user has not explicitly confirmed the exact demolition permit submission in this session

evidence.quote: Submit a completed demolition permit application for demolition permit review.

requirements.subject: agent
conditions: user has not explicitly confirmed the exact certification in this session
